US District Judge Charles Breyer denied Musk’s motion to set aside the verdict in most respects on Monday. A San Francisco jury ruled in March that two of Musk’s May 2022 tweets about the […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> Utah let an AI renew prescriptions without a doctor, and its medical board wants it stopped https://thenextweb.com/news/utah-ai-prescription-refills-doctronic Mon, 06 Jul 2026 19:54:56 +0000 TheNextWeb=30611d2c4f0cafadfd44b345c5f54d99 Utah has quietly become the first US state to let an AI chatbot renew prescriptions without a doctor, according to the Associated Press. The programme, run by a company called Doctronic, launched in January and has set off a fierce medical debate. Residents can skip the doctor’s office and refill prescriptions online through the chatbot. It […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> An AI agent just ran a full ransomware attack with no human at the keyboard https://thenextweb.com/news/jadepuffer-agentic-ai-ransomware Mon, 06 Jul 2026 18:59:54 +0000 TheNextWeb=575203133eab45ceb0d1367a92bb2028 Security firm Sysdig says it has documented the first ransomware attack run end to end by an AI agent, first reported by Business Insider. A large language model planned, executed, and adapted the entire operation, which Sysdig has named JadePuffer. Civil society groups issued a joint statement demanding the abuse be met with accountability, “not impunity”.
